goal: Make mem0 retrieval pass the hard 50-question suite for Slack-backed memory facts.

userStories.title: Build isolated mem0 import + query harness
Run persistent backfill and evaluate 50Q
userStories.verifyCommand:
scripts/mem0_50q_run.sh --mode run >/tmp/mem0_50q_run.log 2>&1 && python3 scripts/mem0_50q_score.py /tmp/openclaw-mem0-fastpath/latest-50q/qa-50.json /tmp/openclaw-mem0-fastpath/latest-50q/expected-50.json >/tmp/mem0_50q_score.log 2>&1 && python3 - <<'PY'
import json
s=json.load(open('/tmp/openclaw-mem0-fastpath/latest-50q/score.json'))
assert s['pass_rate'] >= 0.96, s
PY
